title: Sanskrit
description: Classical language lessons with script, grammar, vocabulary, and sentence practice.

pages.title: Basics
pages.description: Start with sounds, script habits, and the shape of simple words.

pages.title: Grammar
pages.description: Understand nouns, verbs, agreement, and sentence structure.

pages.title: Sentences
pages.description: Practice reading and forming complete sentences.

pages.title: Media
pages.description: Use large exercise images, base64 illustrations, and SVG diagrams.
